description_long: This sandwich features a crusty, golden-brown baguette filled with fresh green lettuce, thick slices of white chicken breast, and juicy red tomato slices. The bread has a rustic, slightly rough exterior with a well-baked finish, while the interior ingredients are neatly layered and visible from the open top. The lettuce provides a vibrant green contrast, peeking out from the sides, and the tomatoes add a pop of red color. The chicken pieces are chunky and moist, with a lightly seasoned appearance. The sandwich is presented on a plain white surface, with no visible packaging or branding. Its overall appearance suggests a fresh, hearty meal suitable for a quick lunch or street food snack.
description: A crusty baguette sandwich filled with lettuce, chicken breast, and tomato slices, presented on a plain white surface. The sandwich looks fresh and hearty, with vibrant colors and a rustic bread exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sandwich, with lettuce, tomato, and chicken clearly visible inside the open baguette.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the sandwich's open top and the layered arrangement of lettuce, tomato, and chicken.
description_view_2: Rear view showing mostly the back of the baguette, with minimal filling visible and the bread's crusty texture prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view focusing on the other end of the sandwich, with the filling still visible but less pronounced than the front.
